notes.en: This build focuses on maximizing [[character:thoma]]'s potential as a Shield Support.
notes.fr: Ce build se concentre sur la maximisation du potentiel de [[character:thoma]] en tant que Support Bouclier.
notes.it: Questa build si concentra sul massimizzare il potenziale di [[character:thoma]] come Supporto Scudo.
notes.ru: Сборка нацелена раскрытие потенциала Томы как источника щита.
